## OGym v0.1.0

Initial crates.io release of OGym, a Rust-native reinforcement-learning
framework with classic-control, toy-text, Rapier, and optional MuJoCo
environments.

### Highlights

- Type-safe action and observation spaces.
- Single and batched environment APIs.
- Classic-control and toy-text reference environments.
- Rapier-based 2D environments.
- MuJoCo environments behind the opt-in `mujoco` feature.

See the [README](https://github.com/mhyrzt/ogym#readme) for installation and
usage instructions.
